theorem proof_6 {alpha : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup alpha] [InnerProductSpace ℝ alpha] [CompleteSpace alpha]
    (beta : ℝ) (eps : ℝ) (K m n : ℕ) (V : ℕ → Matrix (Fin m) (Fin n) ℝ)
    (P : ℕ → Matrix (Fin m) (Fin m) ℝ) (Q : ℕ → Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℝ)
    (f : alpha → ℝ) (X : ℕ → alpha) (sigma_op : ℝ) (hbeta : 0 ≤ beta ∧ beta < 1) (heps : 0 < eps)
    (hV : ∀ k, V k = beta • V (k - 1) + (1 - beta) • (P (k - 1)T • (grad f (X k)) • Q (k - 1)T • Q (k - 1) • (grad f (X k))T • P (k - 1)))
    (hV0 : V 0 = 0) :
    ∑ k in Finset.range K, ∑ i in Finset.range m, ∑ j in Finset.range n,
      Real.sqrt ((V k i j) + eps) ≤
    K * m * n * Real.sqrt (sigma_op ^ 2 + eps) +
    (1 + Real.sqrt beta) * ∑ t in Finset.range K,
      ∑ i in Finset.range m, ∑ j in Finset.range n,
        ((V t i j) + eps)⁻1 * |(P (t - 1)T • (grad f (X t)) • Q (t - 1)T i j)| ^ 2
